title: rubus × deformis
intro: Rubus × deformis, also known as the deformed blackberry or thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the rose family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × deformis include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and supporting digestive health, as well as providing antioxidant and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
